arts.ttl: Why Bologna manager is 'not happy' before Aston Villa as huge Champions League opportunity knocks
arts.sum: Bologna have a few injury concerns heading into the game with Villa as Martin Erlic, Michel Aebischer, Lewis Ferguson and Oussama El Azzouzi all missed the 2-2 draw with Genoa on Saturday. We will be sending the latest breaking news and top Villa stories directly to the WhatsApp community and we want you to be part of it.

arts.ttl: What Unai Emery is 'always hammering on about' to Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers
arts.sum: Aston Villa signed Rogers from Middlesbrough in a deal worth an initial £8m, rising to £15m in add-ons back in January after Emery liked what he saw from the forward when his side played against Boro in the FA Cup third round last season. He scored his second goal of the season in Villa's 3-1 win at Fulham on Saturday, which was the club's first league victory in three games after successive draws against Ipswich Town and Manchester United.
